and by the night when it covers the world with peace:Footnote-2
(O Prophet), your Lord has neither forsaken you, nor is He displeased.Footnote-3
Indeed what is to come will be better for you than what has gone by.Footnote-4
Verily your Lord will soon give you so amply that you will be well-pleased.Footnote-5
Did He not find you an orphan and then gave you shelter?Footnote-6
Did He not find you unaware of the Right Way, and then directed you to it?Footnote-7
And did He not find you in want, and then enriched you?Footnote-8
Therefore, be not harsh with the orphan;Footnote-9
and chide not him who asks,Footnote-10
and proclaim the bounty of your Lord.Footnote-11
